artifact: Count members whose linked major belongs to the College of Engineering.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM member AS m JOIN major AS mj ON m.link_to_major = mj.major_id WHERE mj.college = 'College of Engineering';

raw_response.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM member AS m JOIN major AS mj ON m.link_to_major = mj.major_id WHERE mj.college = 'College of Engineering';
